## SEO Improvement

**What SEO aspect would you like to improve?**

**What type of SEO issue?**

- [ ] Meta tags
- [ ] Page titles
- [ ] URL structure
- [ ] Content optimization
- [ ] Image alt text
- [ ] Schema markup
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Core Web Vitals
- [ ] Internal linking
- [ ] Sitemap
- [ ] Robots.txt
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Where is this SEO element located?**

- [ ] Homepage
- [ ] About page
- [ ] Portfolio page
- [ ] Skills page
- [ ] Contact page
- [ ] Global SEO
- [ ] Blog posts
- [ ] Category pages
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Current SEO implementation**
Describe what's currently implemented for this SEO aspect.

**Proposed improvement**
Describe what improvement you'd like to see.

**SEO tools used (if any)**

- [ ] Google PageSpeed Insights
- [ ] Google Search Console
- [ ] Lighthouse
- [ ] GTmetrix
- [ ] SEMrush
- [ ] Ahrefs
- [ ] Moz
- [ ] Screaming Frog
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Metrics or scores (if available)**

- Performance: [e.g. 85/100]
- SEO: [e.g. 90/100]
- Accessibility: [e.g. 95/100]
- Best Practices: [e.g. 88/100]

**Target keywords**
What keywords should this improvement target?

**Search intent**

- [ ] Informational
- [ ] Navigational
- [ ] Transactional
- [ ] Commercial
- [ ] Local
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the SEO improvement here.

**Priority level**

- [ ] Critical (major SEO issue)
- [ ] High (significant improvement)
- [ ] Medium (moderate enhancement)
- [ ] Low (minor optimization)

**Note**: SEO improvements help with discoverability and user experience!

**Note**: Better SEO can increase organic traffic and visibility!

**Note**: SEO is a long-term investment that requires consistent effort!

**Note**: Focus on user experience first, SEO will follow!

**Note**: Technical SEO provides the foundation for content optimization!
